subcodes.title: Words to Waite, Harrison et al, spoken around 1909-10-15
subcodes.first_line: This was a spiritual condition recognized through the physical senses.... It was just as if two clear crystal goblets were filled with pure water. They were so clear the goblets could not be seen - only the water
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love as fire, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @service to others; to the Cause of God
